label: Implement AI Agent
description: Offer a 24/7 AI chat agent for customer enquiries

default.subject: {{NAME}}: your AI assistant is ready — free demo
default.body:
Never Miss Another Customer Enquiry

Your AI assistant answers questions, captures leads and books appointments — 24/7

Hi {{NAME}},

I came across {{NAME}} in {{CITY}} and wanted to share something that's making a real difference for local businesses, most customer questions arrive outside working hours — and a delayed response often means a lost sale.

✓ 24/7 availability — answers questions, captures enquiries and takes bookings while you sleep
✓ Instant responses — no more missed chats or unanswered contact forms
✓ Lead capture — collects name, email and phone from every visitor automatically
✓ FAQ & product knowledge — trained on your services, prices and policies
✓ Appointment booking — connects to your calendar and books slots automatically
✓ Handover to you — escalates complex questions to your team seamlessly

We can set up a live demo of the AI agent on {{NAME}}'s website in 24 hours — completely free, no commitment.

See a Free Demo

Looking forward to hearing from you,

Best regards,
The WebPower Team

WebPower Team

Digital Solutions for Local Businesses

© 2025 WebPower · Digital Solutions for Local Businesses
